title: Sydney Father Sentenced To More Than 28 Years In Jail For Murdering 3-Year-Old Son | 10 News
description: A Sydney father has been sentenced to more than 28 years in prison for killing his 3-year-old son. title: Nationals Push To Drill In Great Australian Bight To Tackle Future Fuel Shortages | 10 News
description: New Nationals leader Matt Canavan says Australia needs to drill more of its own oil to better protect ourselves from future fuel shortages. title: Denmark’s Plans For US Attack, Crude Oil Warning, South Australia Election | 10’s Late News
